name: CMI Credit Mediators Inc
description_short: CMI is a commercial B2B debt recovery and collection agency serving businesses since 1976, helping companies recover outstanding debts and manage accounts receivable.
description_long:
Credit Mediators Inc. (CMI) was founded in 1976 and has spent over 40 years establishing itself as a leader in commercial B2B debt recovery and collection services. The company is registered, licensed, and bonded in states where required, and serves a wide range of industries including construction, finance, freight, printing, legal services, food and beverage, and commercial insurance. CMI positions itself as a trusted extension of clients' credit and collection departments, with a focus on maintaining customer relationships while recovering outstanding debts.

CMI offers a comprehensive suite of collection and credit services tailored to business clients. Their primary offerings include Direct Collect (proprietary collection programs), Letter Series (expedited collection while maintaining relationships), Outsourcing (first-party collection and accounts receivable management), and Bankruptcy & Turnaround (customized asset recovery when maximizing value matters). Additionally, they provide Credit Report Plus services, allowing businesses to access Experian credit and score reports on demand without long-term commitments. They also offer Business Credit Reports, Commercial Score Reports, and International Credit Reports.

CMI distinguishes itself through industry longevity, multi-level collection experience, and a client portal that provides real-time visibility into collection status. Client testimonials highlight their professionalism in handling long-standing customer relationships, their ability to recover debts others thought uncollectable, and measurable results—one client reports 97% reduction in 120-day receivables and 60% recovery rate on assigned collections. The company emphasizes collaboration with clients to understand their specific requirements and maintain business relationships even during collections.

A key caveat is that CMI is a B2B commercial collection agency, not a consumer financial service. Their services are designed for businesses placing accounts for collection, not for individual consumers seeking personal debt relief or credit repair. The company focuses on maximizing client recovery rates and cash flow, which means their primary obligation is to their business clients, not debtors. While they emphasize professional handling of customer relationships, their core function is debt pursuit on behalf of creditors.
address: 414 Sansom St, Upper Darby Township, PA 19082

company_info.headquarters: 414 Sansom St, Upper Darby Township, PA 19082

pros: Over 40 years of industry experience with established track record and client retention
Multi-tiered collection expertise with different experience levels matched to account complexity
Client web portal providing real-time visibility and status updates on collection accounts
Registered, licensed, and bonded in required states, ensuring legal compliance
Demonstrated recovery results—one client reports 60% collection recovery and 97% reduction in delinquent receivables
Diverse industry expertise serving construction, finance, freight, printing, legal, food/beverage, and insurance sectors
Full-service approach combining collection, letter series, bankruptcy/turnaround, and credit reporting services
cons: B2B commercial service only—not applicable for individual consumers seeking personal debt relief
No pricing, fee structure, or rate information disclosed on website
Limited transparency about collection methods, compliance practices, or consumer protections beyond general licensing claims
Testimonials are from creditor/client perspective only; no debtor or independent third-party reviews provided
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses with recurring accounts receivable and collection challenges
Industries with delinquent account problems (construction, finance, freight, printing, legal services)
Companies seeking to outsource collection operations while maintaining customer relationships
diagnosis: CMI is designed exclusively for business-to-business debt collection and is best for commercial clients with delinquent accounts. Individual consumers should not contact this company—it is a collections agency that pursues debts on behalf of creditors, not a debt relief service for people seeking to resolve personal debts.
services: First-party collection and accounts receivable outsourcing
Customer web portal for collection account visibility
Multi-level collection expertise and account assignment
